description: Style Note Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, you and these pants make a great pair. Designed using cotton fabric, this is perfect when you want that casual sporty look. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these tracks allow easy movement and do not lose shape even after years. While the soft fabric keeps you cool, the polyester helps you stretch with much ease. Pair it with a t-shirt from the wide range available at myntra and achieve maximum performance on and off the field. Product Details Black track pants with an elasticated waistband and drawstring on the inside, two zippered pockets on the sides, branding in rubber print on the left leg, white paneling on either sides and zipper closure at the hem Material and Care 100% polyester Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32&rdquo ) is wearing a size M
